case_title: SYNCHRONY BANK VS. ALDREY BONIFACIO ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100099592)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-17-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK AS TO DEFENDANT BONIFACIO, ALDREY A/K/A ALDREY C BONIFACIO DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-21-2020
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 64155941) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK AS TO DEFENDANT BONIFACIO, ALDREY A/K/A ALDREY C BONIFACIO
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-17-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
